units.source_text: 滙豐時繼續與其薪⾦掛鈎。計劃由獨立公司受託⼈監督，⽽受託⼈對計劃的營運負有受信責任。計劃資產與集團資產分開持有。

units.source_text: 滙豐控股有限公司 2025年報及賬⽬
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings plc 2025 Annual Report and Accounts

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐控股於2025年的僱員報酬及福利⽀出為3,100萬美元（2024年：2,900萬美元；2023年：1,500萬美元）。於2025年的受聘僱員平均數⽬為23⼈
units.translation_target_text: HSBC Holdings' employee compensation and benefits expenses in 2025 will be US$31 million (2024: US$29 million; 2023: US$15 million). The average number of employees employed in 2025 will be 23 (2, 1,)
units.translation_en: HSBC Holdings' employee compensation and benefits expenses in 2025 will be US$31 million (2024: US$29 million; 2023: US$15 million). The average number of employees employed in 2025 will be 23 (2, 1,)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC Holdings' employee compensation and benefits expenses in 2025 will be US$31 million (2024: US$29 million; 2023: US$15 million). The average number of employees employed in 2025 will be 23 (2, 1,)

units.source_text: （2024年︰28⼈：2023年：29⼈）。⼀名僱員屬界定福利退休⾦計劃成員。該僱員為英國滙豐銀⾏（英國）退休⾦計劃的成員。滙豐控股根據計劃
units.translation_target_text: (2024..28 people: 2023: 29 people). An employee is a member of a defined benefit pension scheme. The employee is a member of the HSBC UK Pension Scheme. HSBC Holdings PLC plans
units.translation_en: (2024..28 people: 2023: 29 people). An employee is a member of a defined benefit pension scheme. The employee is a member of the HSBC UK Pension Scheme. HSBC Holdings PLC plans

units.source_text: 受託⼈釐定之供款時間表為僱員向該計劃⽀付供款，並於供款到期時確認為⽀出。
units.translation_target_text: Contributions are paid to the plan by employees based on a contribution schedule determined by the trustee, and are recognized as an expense when the contributions are due.

units.source_text: 滙豐預期於2026年對界定福利退休⾦計劃作出1.09億美元供款，包括零美元⽤於主計劃及1.09億美元⽤於其他計劃。預期在未來五年內每年從計劃

units.source_text: 1 根據所採⽤的披露假設，主計劃的界定福利責任期限為11.4年（2024年︰11.8年），⽽所有其他計劃合計則為9.7年（2024年︰9.8年）。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Based on the disclosure assumptions used, the defined benefit obligation period for the master plan is 11.4 years (2024-11.8 years) and for all other plans combined it is 9.7 years (2024-9.8 years).
